subject: URGENT — Need truck TODAY or tomorrow AM
body:
Jillian — URGENT

One of our carriers just cancelled on us and we need a replacement ASAP.

Van trailer, St. Louis MO to Cincinnati OH
Commodity: Packaged food products (non-temp controlled)
Weight: 41,000 lbs
Must pick up TODAY (April 6) by 4pm or FIRST THING tomorrow morning
Delivery: April 8 by noon

This is a must-ship. Please call me if you can cover this. Happy to pay premium rate.

Raj Patel
QuickShip USA
(314) 555-0199 — CALL ME

expected_extraction.special_requirements: URGENT — carrier cancellation replacement, Premium rate acceptable, Pickup by 4pm today or first thing tomorrow

notes: Urgent request with premium willingness. Tests whether extraction captures urgency context in special_requirements. Dates are relative ('today', 'tomorrow') — extraction must resolve to absolute dates.
